free_text: Measurements of relative thick target yields for PIGE
analysis on light elements in the proton energy
Elemental Be, Mg, C, A1 and Si targets were used in the
form of thick plates. The other targets were made from
chemical compounds by pressing them into pellets.
Nuclear Data 50/50 system composed of a 4k channel
analyzer and a PDP8/i-16k computer was used.
Data were normalized to those taken from
A.Anttila et al., J. Radioanal. Chem., 62 (1981) 441.
No normalization was made for peaks of E > 3.56 MeV.
Yields for gamma lines with E > 3.56 MeV are presented
25cm3, at position of 55 degree relative to the
The experimental uncertainties are not discussed.
